phases.title: Foundation
phases.description: Build strong fundamentals in programming, data structures, and algorithms

phases.title: Core Topics
phases.description: Master key concepts like OOP, databases, and system design

phases.title: Advanced Topics
phases.description: Learn advanced algorithms, distributed systems, and performance optimization

phases.title: Interview Prep
phases.description: Practice coding interviews, behavioral questions, and mock interviews

phases.title: Company Specific
phases.description: Research target companies and prepare for their specific interview processes
